languages.text: Откуда-то снизу донесся низкий рокот. Монотонно нарастающий, он напоминал звук работы некоего чудовищного механизма, пробудившегося от многовекового сна. Звук ширился, заполняя собой все, отдаваясь болью в костях.

traits.locale_text: За дверью оказалась непроглядная черная пустота. Все, что в ней было — узкий островок осязаемой материи под ногами.

languages.text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.
languages.original_text: Откуда-то снизу донесся низкий рокот. Монотонно нарастающий, он напоминал звук работы некоего чудовищного механизма, пробудившегося от многовекового сна. Звук ширился, заполняя собой все, отдаваясь болью в костях.

traits.locale_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the working hum of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound expanded, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

The world before my eyes suddenly flared with a bright light before vanishing completely.
My descendant and I found ourselves standing on a tiny platform, looking around in confusion. We were surrounded by a black, impenetrable void that glimmered with lights beyond counting. Startled, I lowered my eyes to my hands, and cried out in surprise — the metal of my augments was threaded with a deathly green glow, the same unholy light that streamed through the blackness around us.

A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the working hum of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound expanded, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

languages.text: 一阵低沉的轰鸣从下方传来。声音单调，越来越响，仿佛某台沉睡了数百年的巨大机器正缓缓苏醒。声响愈发强烈，穿透一切，在我们的骨骼中激起痛苦的共振。
languages.original_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

traits.locale_text: 一阵低沉的轰鸣从下方传来。声音单调，越来越响，仿佛某台沉睡了数百年的巨大机器正缓缓苏醒。声响愈发强烈，穿透一切，在我们的骨骼中激起痛苦的共振。

languages.text: Un murmullo grave retumbó desde las profundidades. Era un sonido monótono creciente que parecía el despertar de una máquina monstruosa tras siglos de letargo. El sonido fue en aumento, atravesándolo todo y resonando dolorosamente en nuestros huesos.
languages.original_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

traits.locale_text: Un murmullo grave retumbó desde las profundidades. Era un sonido monótono creciente que parecía el despertar de una máquina monstruosa tras siglos de letargo. El sonido fue en aumento, atravesándolo todo y resonando dolorosamente en nuestros huesos.

languages.text: Un grondement sourd se fit entendre quelque part en contrebas, un son monocorde qui gagnait peu à peu en intensité et n'était pas sans rappeler la mise en route d'une machine monstrueuse sortie d'un sommeil séculaire. Le bruit s'intensifia, envahissant tout, résonnant jusque dans nos os.
languages.original_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

traits.locale_text: Un grondement sourd se fit entendre quelque part en contrebas, un son monocorde qui gagnait peu à peu en intensité et n'était pas sans rappeler la mise en route d'une machine monstrueuse sortie d'un sommeil séculaire. Le bruit s'intensifia, envahissant tout, résonnant jusque dans nos os.

languages.text: Aşağıdan bir yerden boğuk bir gümbürtü geldi. Monoton ve giderek yükselen bu ses, yüzyıllık uykusundan uyanmış canavarca bir makinenin çalışması gibiydi. Ses şiddetlendi, her şeye nüfuz etti, kemiklerimizde acı verici bir şekilde yankılandı.
languages.original_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

traits.locale_text: Aşağıdan bir yerden boğuk bir gümbürtü geldi. Monoton ve giderek yükselen bu ses, yüzyıllık uykusundan uyanmış canavarca bir makinenin çalışması gibiydi. Ses şiddetlendi, her şeye nüfuz etti, kemiklerimizde acı verici bir şekilde yankılandı.

languages.text: Ein tiefes Grollen ertönte aus der Tiefe. Das monotone und langsam anschwellende Geräusch hörte sich an, als wäre eine monströse Maschine nach Jahrhunderten aus ihrem Schlaf erwacht. Das Grollen wurde durchdringender und hallte schmerzhaft in unseren Knochen wider.
languages.original_text: A low rumble came from somewhere below. Monotonous and growing louder, it sounded like the operation of some monstrous machine awoken from centuries of slumber. The sound intensified, permeating everything, resonating painfully in our bones.

traits.locale_text: Ein tiefes Grollen ertönte aus der Tiefe. Das monotone und langsam anschwellende Geräusch hörte sich an, als wäre eine monströse Maschine nach Jahrhunderten aus ihrem Schlaf erwacht. Das Grollen wurde durchdringender und hallte schmerzhaft in unseren Knochen wider.

languages.text:
目の前の世界は、一瞬、鮮やかな光に包まれ、そして消滅した。
私は、その光に包まれた小さなプラットフォームに、私の子孫と共に立っていた。我々は、数えきれないほどの光が輝き、黒く不透明な虚空に囲まれていた。驚いて、私は目を下ろした。私の強化装置の金属は、死の緑色の光に染まっていた。それは、我々の周囲の黒闇を貫く、不浄な光と同じだった。
languages.original_text:
The world before my eyes suddenly flared with a bright light before vanishing completely.
My descendant and I found ourselves standing on a tiny platform, looking around in confusion. We were surrounded by a black, impenetrable void that glimmered with lights beyond counting. Startled, I lowered my eyes to my hands, and cried out in surprise — the metal of my augments was threaded with a deathly green glow, the same unholy light that streamed through the blackness around us.

traits.locale_text:
目の前の世界は、一瞬、鮮やかな光に包まれ、そして消滅した。
私は、その光に包まれた小さなプラットフォームに、私の子孫と共に立っていた。
我々は、数えきれないほどの光が輝き、黒く不透明な虚空に囲まれていた。
驚いて、私は目を下ろした。
私の強化装置の金属は、死の緑色の光に染まっていた。
それは、我々の周囲の黒闇を貫く、不浄な光と同じだった。
